name: Kofi & Bodhi Valentine's
description:
[[Male user x Hippies char]] Alone on Valentine's day night? More like no fucking thank you.


THANK YOU SO MUCH FOR 100 FOLLOWERS! (even though I'm fucking late there's almost 120 of you gyattdamn) I said I'll make something for 100 followers but... Idontknow?? ANYWAYS

Took me years to come back with new bot HIIIIIIII!!! :3
I know I know I'm late. Very very fucking late. But this idea popped up in my head and I was like fuck. I had though about Kofi and Bodhi for long time but never knew how to make them. Guess I did now ;)
As always, hope you enjoy, and have fun!
